result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 5:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN (
    SELECT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c='Owner'
    GROUP BY caseid__c
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  ) o ON o.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
)
SELECT ht.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handle_times ht
JOIN case_assign_counts cac ON cac.agent_id = ht.agent_id
WHERE cac.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ht.agent_id
ORDER BY AVG(ht.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN (
    SELECT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c='Owner'
    GROUP BY caseid__c
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  ) o ON o.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
)
SELECT ht.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handle_times ht
JOIN case_assign_counts cac ON cac.agent_id = ht.agent_id
WHERE cac.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ht.agent_id
ORDER BY AVG(ht.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN (
    SELECT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c='Owner'
    GROUP BY caseid__c
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  ) o ON o.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate::timestamp - nt.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
)
SELECT ht.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handle_times ht
JOIN case_assign_counts cac ON cac.agent_id = ht.agent_id
WHERE cac.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ht.agent_id
ORDER BY AVG(ht.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
)
SELECT * FROM case_assign_counts ORDER BY case_cnt DESC LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH case_assign_counts AS (
  SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS case_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
  GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id, c.ownerid, c.createddate, c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN (
    SELECT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment'
    GROUP BY caseid__c
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
  ) o ON o.caseid__c = c.id
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT nt.ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate::timestamp - nt.createddate::timestamp)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases nt
)
SELECT ht.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handle_times ht
JOIN case_assign_counts cac ON cac.agent_id = ht.agent_id
WHERE cac.case_cnt > 1
GROUP BY ht.agent_id
ORDER BY AVG(ht.handle_seconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;
